---
title: "CH4"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, comment = ""}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)   
library(dunn.test)
library(AER) 
library(DT) 

QQ <- read_excel("C:/Users/x2991/Downloads/QQ.xlsx")

QQ$grp <- factor(rep(c("School", "Shop", "Clinic", "Tour", "USR"), each = 20),
                 levels = c("School", "Shop", "Clinic", "Tour", "USR"))

zh_labels <- c("School" = "就學", "Shop" = "購物", "Clinic" = "就醫", "Tour" = "觀光", "USR" = "USR活動")

#建立一個最優秀的表格

datatable(QQ, 
          caption = '表 4-1：兩階段 Network DEA 效率分析與投入產出數據',
          colnames = c(
            "搭乘目的" = "purpose", 
            "階段一投入：志工時間(小時)" = "S1IAE",        
            "階段一投入：學生時間(小時)" = "S2IAE",        
            "階段一投入：油資(元)" = "MOAE",               
            "階段一投入：補貼(元)" = "S2OAE",
            "中間產出：準時程度(0-1)" = "VT", 
            "中間產出：有效人公里(人公里)" = "ST",
            "中間產出：服務覆蓋率(0-1)" = "OIL",
            "階段二投入：學生計算時間(小時)" = "STS",
            "最終產出：總節省(元)" = "Money",
            "最終產出：活動收穫(分)" = "SH",
            "最終產出：減碳量(公斤)" = "CO",
            "第一階段效率" = "S1E",       
            "第二階段效率" = "S2E",      
            "最終效率" = "FE"        
          ),
          options = list(
            pageLength = 10, 
            scrollX = TRUE, 
            autoWidth = TRUE, 
            columnDefs = list(
              list(className = 'dt-center', targets = '_all'),
              list(width = '130px', targets = '_all'),
              list(visible = FALSE, targets = -1) 
            ),
            language = list(
              search = "搜尋 DEA 指標 / DMU：", 
              lengthMenu = "效率數據每頁顯示 _MENU_ 筆"
            )
          ))


p1 <- ggplot(QQ, aes(x = grp, y = S1E, fill = grp)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 2, aes(color = grp)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = zh_labels) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "圖 4-1：第一階段目的別分佈箱形圖", x = "搭乘目的", y = "第一階段效率") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial Unicode MS", size = 12), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13))

p2 <- ggplot(QQ, aes(x = grp, y = S2E, fill = grp)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 2, aes(color = grp)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = zh_labels) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "圖 4-2：第二階段目的別分佈箱形圖", x = "搭乘目的", y = "第二階段效率") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial Unicode MS", size = 12), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13))

p3 <- ggplot(QQ, aes(x = grp, y = FE, fill = grp)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 2, aes(color = grp)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = zh_labels) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "圖 4-3：最終效率目的別分佈箱形圖", x = "搭乘目的", y = "最終效率") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial Unicode MS", size = 12), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13))

print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)

ggsave("docs/plot_S1E.png", plot = p1, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("docs/plot_S2E.png", plot = p2, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("docs/plot_FE.png", plot = p3, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# =========================================================================
# 4.1 統計檢定與 Tobit 迴歸（英文變數完美對齊，再也聽不到 cli_abort 碎碎念！）
# =========================================================================
cat("\n=== [檢定 A] 第一階段營運效率（S1E） ===\n")
print(kruskal.test(S1E ~ grp, data = QQ))
cat("\n=== [檢定 B] 第二階段社會福祉效率（S2E） ===\n")
print(kruskal.test(S2E ~ grp, data = QQ))
cat("\n=== [檢定 C] 最終完全體效率（FE） ===\n")
print(kruskal.test(FE ~ grp, data = QQ))

cat("\n=== [Tobit 迴歸] 第二階段社會福祉效率之決定因素 ===\n")
tobit_model <- tobit(S2E ~ MOAE + S1IAE, left = 0, right = 1, data = QQ)
summary(tobit_model)
